title: Vivace Beachfront | Mediterranean restaurant in Playa Hermosa
desc: Beachfront restaurant in Playa Hermosa de Jacó, Costa Rica, led by Sicilian Chef Luigi. Mediterranean and Italian cuisine with fresh local ingredients.

Vivace Beachfront

Where exceptional cuisine meets one of the most breathtaking oceanfront views in Costa Rica.

Vivace Beachfront

Nestled just steps from the sands of Playa Hermosa, Vivace Beachfront is more than a restaurant—it's an experience. Here, the rhythm of the Pacific Ocean, warm tropical breezes, handcrafted cocktails, and unforgettable cuisine come together to create moments you'll remember long after your vacation ends.

Led by Chef Luigi , whose roots trace back to Sicily, Italy, every dish is inspired by generations of Mediterranean tradition and elevated with the freshest local ingredients Costa Rica has to offer.

Whether you're enjoying a romantic sunset dinner, a family celebration, or a leisurely beachfront lunch, Vivace delivers world-class dining in a setting unlike any other. Come for the view. Stay for the food. Return for the experience.

Chef Luigi

A Taste of Sicily. A Passion Without Limits.

For Chef Luigi, cooking is more than a profession—it's a lifelong passion rooted in family, tradition, and the belief that great food has the power to bring people together.

Born and raised in Sicily, Italy, Luigi learned from an early age that the best meals aren't measured by complexity, but by the quality of the ingredients, the love poured into every dish, and the memories created around the table.

Today, he brings that same philosophy to Vivace Beachfront, where every plate reflects decades of experience, unwavering dedication, and a genuine love for his craft.

Known for his creativity, attention to detail, and relentless pursuit of excellence, Chef Luigi has earned a reputation for transforming simple ingredients into extraordinary culinary experiences. His dishes celebrate the rich traditions of Mediterranean cuisine while embracing the incredible flavors and fresh ingredients found along Costa Rica's Pacific coast.

But what truly sets Luigi apart is his heart. Every sauce is crafted with purpose. Every dish tells a story. Every meal is prepared with the same pride and passion he would serve to his own family.

Guests don't simply dine at Vivace—they experience the soul of a chef who pours himself into every plate that leaves his kitchen. For Chef Luigi, cooking isn't a job. It's who he is.

Vivace Experience

Sicilian master with passion for Mediterranean cuisine

Iguana Bar

Located next to the main pool, Iguana Bar is the perfect place to cool off without leaving the water. Enjoy tropical cocktails, cold drinks, and light snacks while relaxing under the sun.

With direct pool service, you can enjoy your favorite drinks without interrupting your relaxation moment. The casual and tropical atmosphere makes this space a favorite among our guests during the day.

Hours:
10:00 AM - 6:00 PM
Golden Beach Bar

Directly on the beach, Golden Beach Bar offers the ultimate beachfront bar experience. With your feet in the sand and the sound of waves as your soundtrack, enjoy craft cocktails and cold beer.

The ideal place to watch the sunset with a drink in hand, share with friends, or simply contemplate the Pacific Ocean in all its splendor.

Hours:
11:00 AM - 7:00 PM
Location:
Playa Hermosa, direct access

Artisan Bakery

Our bakery offers specialty coffee and freshly baked products every morning. The aroma of freshly baked bread and highland coffee will give you the perfect welcome to the day.

From buttery croissants to artisan breads and homemade pastries, each product is made with dedication and the finest ingredients.

Did You Know?

In the heart of Jacó, you'll find Vivace — the authentic Italian eatery and pizzeria with over 70,000 followers that inspired the Mediterranean cuisine you love at Terraza del Pacífico. Both restaurants are led by Chef Luigi, who brings the same Sicilian passion and culinary dedication to every table. When visiting Jacó, don't miss the original Vivace experience.
